exercises.title: Clifford Gate Verifier
exercises.description: Verify that gates are Clifford by checking Pauli conjugation.
tasks: Implement U P U† for arbitrary 2x2 unitary U
Check if result is a Pauli (up to phase)
Verify H, S, X, Y, Z are Clifford
Show T gate is NOT Clifford
Test random unitaries
hints: Check all four Paulis: I, X, Y, Z
Result is Pauli if it's proportional to I, X, Y, or Z
T X T† = (X + Y)/√2 - not a Pauli

exercises.title: Tableau Simulator
exercises.description: Implement efficient Clifford circuit simulation using tableaux.
tasks: Represent n stabilizers as binary (x,z,phase) vectors
Implement H, S, CNOT gate updates
Track phase correctly
Simulate Bell state creation
Simulate GHZ state creation
hints: H: swap x and z bits
S: z ^= x, phase update if x=1
Bell: stabilizers should be XX, ZZ

exercises.title: QEC Simulator
exercises.description: Use Clifford simulation to verify quantum error correction.
tasks: Implement Steane code encoding in tableau form
Apply single Pauli errors
Measure syndromes using tableau
Apply corrections
Verify state is restored
hints: Encoding: track stabilizer evolution through circuit
Error: multiply stabilizers by error Pauli

exercises.title: Clifford + T Complexity
exercises.description: Analyze how T gates break efficient simulation.
tasks: Implement simulation with limited T gates
Track exponential growth with T count
Estimate classical resources vs T count
Find practical limit on current hardware
Plot complexity growth
exercises.expectedOutput: Analysis of Clifford + T simulation complexity
hints: Each T creates superposition of stabilizer states
